The '''MRX-BR Pacifier''' was a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] vehicle produced by [[Sydon Vehicle Works]].

==History==
[[File:Mrx-br-tur.jpg|thumb|left|A schematic of a MRX-BR Pacifier]]
The Pacifier was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Scout ship/Legends|scout vessel]] of choice. It was designed to act as either a high-tech contact [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] or as a powerful assault vessel, successful in both roles. The Empire employed this craft to seek out new [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] and if necessary, deliver a devastating strike to them. Though it normally held three [[Gunner/Legends|gunners]], powerful [[Computer/Legends|computer]]-controlled weapons enabled the craft to inflict maximum destruction with minimal effort with a single [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]].

The Pacifier was equipped with some of the most powerful sensor arrays built in its era and its sensors were capable of counting the number of leaves on a particular tree from orbit.<ref name="GG8" /> The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] considered this craft too provocative for encounters with frightened primitives and discontinued use of it.
